search_queries_used: site:asahq.org standards postanesthesia care recovery record monitoring
site:doh.gov.ae day surgery postprocedure recovery documentation
site:rcoa.ac.uk day surgery recovery discharge documentation
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic management or dose instructions for Post-anesthesia recovery documentation
generic anesthesia landing pages without an exact section for Post-anesthesia recovery documentation
rejection_reasons: Findings and discharge decisions must reflect actual clinician observations.
The candidate source category "automatic discharge scoring" did not provide exact documentation-only evidence for this workflow and was not mapped.
Autonomous management, medication, dose, procedure, escalation, or discharge instructions were outside the documentation-only scope.
Landing pages and search snippets were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Patients recovering after general, regional, or monitored anesthesia care.
setting_applicability: Direct for PACU or equivalent recovery documentation; ward, ICU, and home follow-up require separate context.
UAE_applicability: International ASA evidence supported by direct DoH recovery and record requirements.
recency_verification: Current ASA 2024, ASA 2023, DoH V1/2024, and RCoA GPAS 2025 sources were reviewed on 2026-07-13.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA standard supports continual documented recovery evaluation and a recovery record for oxygenation, ventilation, circulation, consciousness, temperature, pain, and other observations.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documented oxygenation, ventilation, circulation, consciousness, temperature, pain or other recovery observations, and use of a recovery score where appropriate.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for Post-anesthesia recovery documentation; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

unresolved_source_gaps: Actual vital signs, airway, pain, nausea, temperature, fluids, urine, bleeding, medicines, events, score, intervention, response, destination, and discharge decision remain unsupported.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
